faqs.q: What are the World Real Estate Excellence Awards?
faqs.a: An international, jury-led recognition programme honouring outstanding property developers, architects, brokers, agencies, interior designers and luxury real estate brands across 90+ countries.
Any property developer, real estate agency, broker, architect, interior designer, construction firm, smart-building company, property manager or proptech innovator is eligible.
An independent jury scores entries against published criteria covering design quality, innovation, sustainability, customer experience, financial performance and community impact.
14 November 2026 at the Westin Marina Hotel, Dubai, UAE. 5:00 PM – 11:00 PM.
A globally recognised trophy, an official winner's seal, an editorial profile, a listing in the winners directory and invitations to industry networking events.
Yes. Most organisations enter two to four categories.
Yes. Dedicated regional categories cover Asia, Europe, Middle East, North America, South America, Africa, Oceania and GCC.

faqs.q: How do I submit a nomination?
faqs.a: Visit https://worldrealestateaward.com/award-nomination and complete the official form.
Nomination fees vary by category. Contact awards@goldentreeawards.com for details.

faqs.q: How long does the judging process take?
faqs.a: Submissions are reviewed over several weeks by an independent panel. Shortlists are announced ahead of the gala.
